description_long: This is a vintage-style, single-propeller airplane with a cream-colored fuselage and wings, accented by dark blue or black outlines along the wing edges and tail. The registration number 'NC13158' is prominently displayed in bold black letters on the upper surface of the right wing and the left side of the tail. The aircraft features a high-wing configuration, with the wings mounted above the fuselage, and a conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer. The nose houses a visible radial piston engine with a two-blade propeller, and the landing gear is a fixed taildragger type with two main wheels and a small tail wheel. The cockpit is located at the front of the fuselage and appears to be enclosed, likely accommodating one or two seats. This airplane's design is reminiscent of classic general aviation or bush planes, suitable for small airfields or rural environments.
description: A cream-colored, high-wing vintage airplane with a single propeller, fixed taildragger landing gear, and bold registration markings on the wing and tail. The aircraft features an enclosed forward cockpit and a conventional tail design.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the cream fuselage, high-mounted wings with dark outlines, and the registration number on the right wing and tail.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the radial engine, two-blade propeller, fixed main landing gear, and the high-wing configuration.
description_view_2: Bottom-up view from the opposite side, displaying the left wing with registration, tail structure, and undercarriage.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the tail's vertical stabilizer, tail wheel, and the symmetry of the wings and landing gear.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: High-wing, straight wings with no visible winglets or pronounced dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Single radial piston engine mounted at the nose
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers
attribute_landing_gear_type: Fixed taildragger with two main wheels and a tail wheel
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit likely configured for one or two seats
